summary: Backend testing complete for VIP Social and AI features. All 20 tests PASSED. Verified: POST /api/vip/social/posts/create (with/without images), GET /api/vip/social/feed/enhanced, POST /api/vip/ai/analyze-image (GPT-4o Vision), GET/POST /api/vip/social/posts/{post_id}/comments
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/vip/social/posts/create correctly handles: content (max 1000 chars), image_base64 (optional), crypto_mentions array
GET /api/vip/social/feed/enhanced returns all required fields: id, author_name, content, crypto_mentions, has_image, image_url, likes, comments_count, is_liked, is_vip, created_at
POST /api/vip/ai/analyze-image uses GPT-4o Vision via emergentintegrations - REAL API, NOT MOCKED
Comments endpoints (GET/POST) work correctly with proper 404 for non-existent posts
All VIP endpoints correctly require authentication (401/403 for unauthenticated requests)
Content length validation working (400 for >1000 chars)
seed_data_creation: Test posts created during testing with UUIDs for easy identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All VIP Social and AI endpoints are functional. GPT-4o Vision integration is working via emergentintegrations (real API). Image upload stores base64 in MongoDB. Enhanced feed includes all image-related fields.

api_endpoints_tested.result: Creates posts with optional images, stores image in post_images collection
Returns paginated feed with has_image, image_url, crypto_mentions, is_liked fields
GPT-4o Vision analyzes image, returns detailed analysis in French
Returns list of comments with author_name, is_vip, content, created_at
Adds comment to post, returns 404 for non-existent post

mocked_apis_note: NO MOCKED APIs - GPT-4o Vision integration is REAL via emergentintegrations library with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
